understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to move all selectable pieces onto designated goal tiles (`+`), simultaneously, in each level to win the game. Each level is a grid with obstacles and a limited number of steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is primarily by clicking a target position, which moves the selected piece horizontally or vertically in a straight line to that position if unobstructed. Pieces slide until they hit an obstacle or the edge of the grid. Arrow keys (MOVE_UP, etc.) appear not to move the piece. Some clicks had no effect, suggesting the path was blocked by obstacles or other pieces. Only one piece is selected at a time, and it must reach a goal tile to progress.

understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is primarily by clicking a target position, which moves the selected piece horizontally or vertically in a straight line to that position if unobstructed.
